creator: yuri@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 217399
Makefile

In the attached Makefile for a future port misc/hs-hascard USE_CABAL, returned by 'make make-use-cabal' contains QuickCheck-2.14.1 but a number of other packages contain a limitation like 'QuickCheck >= 2.9 && < 2.14'. As a result, build fails.
